title: PARENTING RESOURCES - 211info
text: INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES PARENTING RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a resource closet of baby clothing and toys for enrolled program participants. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Parents age 22 and younger Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 239-6996 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 77, and 75. Near Hollywood Transit Center. Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Family Support Centers/Outreach Parenting Materials Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ECHO INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMESAFE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEEDS INFORMATION SERVICES - CHRISTINA PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
